zh.lifeSummary: 當Frethesant de Paynell於大約1170年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，她的父親William Paynell Lord of Hooton37歲，母親Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy31歲。她於1190年2月26日與Geoffrey Luttrell結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1240年在英國享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Paynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Pernel, Parnell (Old French Peronel(le)) from Latin Petronilla, a feminine pet form of the Latin personal name Petronius. Petronilla was the name of a supposed early Christian saint and martyr. This surname was also brought to Ireland from Cheshire in the 17th century, by a family who had been supporters of Cromwell's Parliamentarians during the English Civil War. Charles Stewart Parnell, who founded the Irish Parliamentary Party in 1882, was a descendant of this family. See also Pennell .

variants.name: Penn
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Penn (in Buckinghamshire and Staffordshire), both of which are named with Brittonic penn ‘head’, often used in hill-names.

English: topographic name or metonymic occupational name from Middle English pen(n) ‘enclosure, animal pen, fold’ (Old English penn), for someone who lived by or worked at a fold. Examples of this surname are formally difficult to distinguish from those in 1 above.
English: from a pet form of the female personal name Pernel, see Parnell .

variants.name: Pernell
meanings: English (Middlesex and Warwickshire): variant of   Parnell  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Pennell
meanings: metronym from the Middle English female personal name Pennel (an assimilated form of Parnell ).

habitational name from Penn Hall in Pensax (Worcestershire), or from either of two places called Penhill in Devon and Yorkshire, or possibly from Pendle in Lancashire. All of the placenames probably derive from British penn ‘head’ + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Frethesant de Paynell was born about 1170, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Paynell Lord of Hooton, was 37 and her mother, Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy, was 31. She married Geoffrey Luttrell on 26 February 1190. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1240, in England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frethesant de Paynell est née environ 1170, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Paynell Lord of Hooton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey Luttrell le 26 février 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1240, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frethesant de Paynell um 1170 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Paynell Lord of Hooton 37 und ihre Mutter Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy 31. Sie hat am 26. Februar 1190 Geoffrey Luttrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1240 im Alter von 71 Jahren in England.

ko.lifeSummary: Frethesant de Paynell(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Paynell Lord of Hooton(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1190년 2월 26일 Geoffrey Luttrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 영국에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frethesant de Paynell родилась около 1170 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Paynell Lord of Hooton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Frethesanda de Munchensy, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Luttrell 26 февраля 1190 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1240 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 71 год.
